sentences.arabic: يُشَكِّلُ الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ لَوْحَةً فَنِّيَّةً تَنْصَهِرُ فِيهَا النَّكَهَاتُ وَالتَّوَابِلُ الشَّرْقِيَّةُ لِتُقَدِّمَ مَذَاقًا لَا يُقَاوَمُ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja predstavlja umjetničku sliku u kojoj se stapaju istočnjački okusi i začini kako bi ponudili neodoljiv ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine forms an artistic canvas where Eastern flavors and spices melt together to offer an irresistible taste.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْمَائِدَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ عَلَى مَبْدَأِ الْمُشَارَكَةِ، حَيْثُ تَلْتَفُّ الْعَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ أَطْبَاقٍ مُتَنَوِّعَةٍ مِثْلِ "الْكَبْسَةِ" أَوْ "الْمَنْسَفِ" أَوْ "الْمَازَةِ" الشَّامِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska trpeza zasniva se na principu dijeljenja, gdje se porodica okuplja oko raznovrsnih jela poput 'kabse', 'mansafa' ili levantskih meza.
sentences.translationEn: The Arab table is based on the principle of sharing, where the family gathers around diverse dishes such as 'Kabsa,' 'Mansaf,' or Levantine 'Mezza.'

sentences.arabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ زُيُوتُ الزَّيْتُونِ وَالأَعْشَابُ الْبَرِّيَّةُ بِكَثْرَةٍ، مِمَّا يُضْفِي طَابَعًا صِحِّيًّا وَطَبِيعِيًّا عَلَى الْوَجَبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Maslinovo ulje i samoniklo bilje koriste se u izobilju, što obrocima daje zdrav i prirodan karakter.
sentences.translationEn: Olive oil and wild herbs are used extensively, giving the meals a healthy and natural character.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَكْتَمِلُ الْغَدَاءُ دُونَ الشَّايِ بِالنَّعْنَاعِ الَّذِي يُعَدُّ طَقْسًا اِجْتِمَاعِيًّا لِتَبَادُلِ الأَحَادِيثِ وَالأَخْبَارِ.
sentences.translation: Ručak nije potpun bez čaja s nantom, koji se smatra društvenim ritualom za razmjenu razgovora i vijesti.
sentences.translationEn: Lunch is not complete without mint tea, which is considered a social ritual for exchanging conversation and news.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْكَرَمَ فِي تَقْدِيمِ الطَّعَامِ يُعَدُّ مِقْيَاسًا لِحُبِّ الآخَرِينَ وَتَقْدِيرِهِمْ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Velikodušnost u posluživanju hrane smatra se mjerilom ljubavi i uvažavanja drugih u arapskim društvima.
sentences.translationEn: Generosity in serving food is a measure of love and appreciation for others in Arab societies.
